title: CARE FACILITIES AND SENIOR HOUSING - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY DISABILITY, AGING AND VETERAN SERVICES CARE FACILITIES AND SENIOR HOUSING Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides resources to help individuals and families find adult foster homes, residential care facilities, assisted living facilities, and nursing facilities. Lists contain contact information and whether the facility accepts Medicaid clients. Long-term care facility search website provides additional details about each facility. 5240 NE Elam Young Parkway Suite 300 Hillsboro, OR 97124 Eligibility: Varies by service Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 846-3060 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 846-3060 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Washington County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Near Hawthorn Farm MAX station Services: Nursing Facility Referrals Older Adult/Disability Related Supportive Housing Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - SENIOR HEALTH INSURANCE BENEFITS ASSISTANCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BENEFITS ENROLLMENT CENTER INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID MONEY MANAGEMENT - MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY DISABILITY, AGING AND VETERAN SERVICES
